## Summary
- Summary of the change and why it is needed.
- Link to related issue, if any.

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Maintenance / dependency update

## Checklist
- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING](CONTRIBUTING.md) if present
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my changes
- [ ] I have added/updated tests where needed
- [ ] I have updated docs if this changes behavior
- [ ] All local checks pass: `make test`

## Additional Notes
Add any notes for reviewers here.
